ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "used_price" REAL /* Used price of the book */,
  "new_price" REAL /* New price of the book */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of customer reviews */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher of the book */,
  "item_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the book */,
  "sales_rank" INTEGER /* Sales rank of the book */,
  "book_rank" REAL /* Book rank of the book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the book was published */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the book */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the book */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "cover_type" TEXT /* Cover type of the book (e.g., hardcover, paperback) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the book */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the book */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the book */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the book data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the author */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the author */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the publisher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_authors" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the book (e.g., author, co-author, translator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_publishers" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the book was published by this publisher */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the book published by this publisher (if different from the primary ISBN) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_genres" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "primary_genre" INTEGER /* Whether the genre is the primary genre for the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "preferred_genre" TEXT /* Customer's preferred genre of books */,
  "preferred_authors" TEXT /* Customer's preferred authors */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method chosen for the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the book in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the book at the time of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the book in the order */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal for the order item (quantity * unit price - discount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Whether the review is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)
